creator: motoom@xs4all.nl
text:
The SEE ALSO section of manpage wi(4) contains this broken link:

   HCF Light programming specification http://www.wavelan.com

Fix: The supplied patch changes the URL into http://bwrc.eecs.berkeley.edu/People/Grad_Students/jbeutel/wavelan_s0005-11-light.htm
which contains the said specification.


Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Try to open http://www.wavelan.com in your browser
